x-enumeration-literals.name: Deactivated
x-enumeration-literals.description: The CA event is deactivated. The clients cannot send instruction anymore. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expired
x-enumeration-literals.description: The CA event is expired, no more processing, claims, transformations take place. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Withdrawn
x-enumeration-literals.description: The CA event is withrawn, ie, cancelled by the market. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Inactive
x-enumeration-literals.description: Option is not active and can no longer be responded to. Any responses already processed against this option will remain valid, eg, expired option. (ISO20022)
